productDisplayName: Nike Men Air Max Courtballistec Blue & White Sports Shoes
description: Built for action on the courts, but perfect as a lifestyle shoe, the nike Courtballistec is best known as Rafael Nadal's signature shoe. The Courtballistec 4.3 features a Hyperfuse composite upper with dual-density Drag-on 2x support, Lunarlon foam midsole with visible Max Air heel unit, and a full-length XDR (extra durable rubber) outsole compound. These are the model updates for the 4.3 from the previous versions of the Courtballistec.UpperHeavily meshed upper for breathability, with synthetic overlays for enhanced shoe structureLacing system for a snug, customised FitMeshed and padded tongue and collar for all-day comfortOutsole reinforced onto the upper at the toe to act as a toe guardMidsoleAirmax technology on the midsoleLunarlon foam midsole for impact protection and lightweight comfortOutsoleTPR outsole with flex grooves for ease of movementPatterned grooves for grip and tractionShoe careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
